mapper.select: SELECT fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_order_count, SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_count, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id), 0), 1 ) AS achievement_rate FROM factory_line fl LEFT JOIN equipment_process ep ON fl.factory_line_id = ep.factory_line_id LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON ep.equipment_process_id = eq.equipment_process_id LEFT JOIN worker_deployment wd ON eq.equipment_id = wd.equipment_id LEFT JOIN matching_record mr ON wd.employee_id = mr.employee_id AND DATE(mr.created_at) BETWEEN wd.start_date AND COALESCE(wd.end_date, CURDATE()) LEFT JOIN orders o ON mr.order_id = o.order_id GROUP BY fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name

SELECT fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name, COUNT(DISTINCT wd.employee_id) AS assigned_technician_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'INPROGRESS' THEN o.order_id END) AS in_progress_order_count, COUNT(DISTINCT eq.equipment_id) AS total_equipment_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN eq.equipment_status = 'OPERATING' THEN eq.equipment_id END) AS operating_equipment_count, ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN eq.equipment_status = 'OPERATING' THEN eq.equipment_id END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT eq.equipment_id), 0), 1 ) AS operation_rate FROM factory_line fl LEFT JOIN equipment_process ep ON fl.factory_line_id = ep.factory_line_id LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON ep.equipment_process_id = eq.equipment_process_id LEFT JOIN worker_deployment wd ON eq.equipment_id = wd.equipment_id AND (wd.end_date IS NULL OR wd.end_date >= CURDATE()) LEFT JOIN matching_record mr ON wd.employee_id = mr.employee_id AND DATE(mr.created_at) = CURDATE() LEFT JOIN orders o ON mr.order_id = o.order_id WHERE fl.factory_line_id = #{lineId} GROUP BY fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name
